description: Internal marketing command center for all RC Emporium ventures (Invoice AI, RCBID, VEPKAR, AVOS). Generates social media posts, builds email campaigns, creates landing pages, tracks SEO keywords, manages a content calendar with scheduling, and builds lead capture forms. Dark theme, Canadian market focus, internal use only for the founder.
features: Social media post generator (LinkedIn, Twitter, Facebook) with AI-powered copy
Email campaign builder with templates and sequence automation
Landing page generator with drag-and-drop or template selection
SEO keyword tracker with ranking and suggestions
Content calendar with scheduling and venture-specific filtering
Lead capture form builder with embed codes
Multi-venture support: Invoice AI, RCBID, VEPKAR, AVOS
